title: lithocarpus variolosus
intro: Lithocarpus variolosus, also known as the Taiwan nut oak, is a species of tree native to Taiwan and southern China. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to lower cholesterol and blood pressure due to its high content of flavonoids and saponins. The health benefits of Lithocarpus variolosus include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help to protect against cardiovascular disease and improve overall well-being. Lithocarpus variolosus is commonly used in traditional herbal preparations, often in the form of decoctions, infusions, or extracts, to promote cardiovascular health and reduce the risk of chronic diseases.
